message:
Skip items with missing anchors instead of positioning at top=0

Items without a resolved anchor now log an error and are excluded from
positioning, matching the original DiffFloatingThreads behavior. This
prevents items from unexpectedly collapsing to the top of the container.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/mkmxx8tckukc2p79ej3466ky
